

Pre-condition 1:
Web page: https://portal.pwb.plume-dev.com/home/swagger

Please setting token via web page first and don't close this web page when you need execute API

1.  call /pwb/PlumeCloudLogin to get PlumeAccessToken and Home userId with your homepass email address/password
2.  call /pwb/AuthenticateWithPlumeToken to get the PWB accessToken with the PlumeAccessToken and userId from #1.
3.  add the PWB cloud accessToken from #2 to Authorize icon(In the Web page).


"data": {
    "id": "bmplgN5mjC5L9OptCbCqIIh2K2lh9AlHR62gHvnRIMJPb1pIBEWCGJqS0kDIYJay",   // This is the PlumeAccessToken to use in the /pwb/AuthenticateWithPlumeToken request in #2.
    "ttl": 3600,
    "created": "2022-03-10T01:53:32.925Z",
    "userId": "62226a3c38beb79efce0d2ee",      //This is the homepass userid to use in #2.
    "expireAt": "2022-03-10T02:53:32.925Z",

 Pre-condition 2:

Installation
Install pygatt with pip from PyPI:

$ pip install pygatt
The BlueZ backend is not supported by default as it requires pexpect, which can only be installed in a UNIX-based environment. If you wish to use that backend, install the optional dependencies with:

$ pip install "pygatt[GATTTOOL]"

Linux / Mac

1. It's in python3 (Has been moved to python3)
2. Install python packages: 

   requests, toml, pytest, pytest-html, pytest-timeout, assertpy, Flask
    
   python3 -m pip install pytest-repeat 
   #requests-kerberos

   #pandas

3. To run whole suites:
    python -m pytest or pytest
4. To run one suite:
    pytest test_xxxx.py --html=report.html or python -m pytest test_xxxx.py --html=report.html

    or py.test test_xxxx.py --html=report.html -vv

    
5.  Additional report object (include dashboard / overview)
    mac: brew install allure
    linux : pip install allure

     python -m pytest test_GetDeviceStatusByUser.py --alluredir=./test_report ./tests

     allure serve ./test_report

   

pip3 install pygatt --use-pep517 
pip3 install "pygatt[GATTTOOL]"
pip3 install "setuptools<58.0.0"
pip3 install django-celery
pip3 install pybluez
